[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 1100100 3
7 1000111 4

70 07 1000000 1
